requirement: Announcements, audit trail, force logout + suspension with order cascade

tasks.title: Announcements + audit trail + force-logout types and stores
tasks.description:
Add types and stores for announcements, audit trail, and force-logout.

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/types/types.go:

- Announcement struct: ID, Title, Body, Audience string (PUBLIC/CUSTOM), AudienceFirmIDs []string, SenderID, TenantID, CreatedAt — json tags
- AuditEntry struct: ID, EntityType string (ORDER/TRADE/INSTRUMENT/PARTICIPANT/MARKET/CIRCUIT_BREAKER), EntityID, Action string (CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/BUST/CORRECT/SUSPEND/HALT), ActorID, Details map[string]interface{}, TenantID, Timestamp — json tags

APPEND to src/securities-service/internal/store/store.go:
- AnnouncementStore interface: Create(*Announcement) error, List(tenantID string) ([]Announcement, error)
- AuditStore interface: Log(*AuditEntry) error, List(filters AuditFilters) ([]AuditEntry, error)
- AuditFilters struct: EntityType, EntityID, ActorID, StartDate, EndDate string
- InMemoryAnnouncementStore, InMemoryAuditStore

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Handlers: announcements, audit trail, force-logout/suspend + gateway
tasks.description:
Add HTTP endpoints and wire audit logging into existing operations.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md for types.

Part A — Announcement handlers (new: handlers_announcement.go):
- POST /api/v1/securities/announcements — create (validate: title, body required, audience PUBLIC or CUSTOM)
- GET /api/v1/securities/announcements — list (filtered by tenant)

Part B — Audit trail handler (new: handlers_audit.go):
- GET /api/v1/securities/audit-trail?entity_type=ORDER&actor_id=ADMIN&start_date=2026-04-24 — list with filters

Part C — Force logout + suspend (add to handlers_participant.go):
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/force-logout — set participant status to SUSPENDED, mass cancel all PENDING orders for that participant (reuse mass cancel logic)
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/suspend — same as force-logout but also logs audit entry
- POST /api/v1/securities/participants/{id}/reinstate — set back to ACTIVE

Part D — Wire audit logging into key operations:
- In handleSubmitOrder: log AuditEntry(ORDER, CREATE) after successful order
- In handleBustTrade: log AuditEntry(TRADE, BUST)
- In handleUpdateInstrumentStatus: log AuditEntry(INSTRUMENT, HALT/UPDATE)
- In force-logout/suspend: log AuditEntry(PARTICIPANT, SUSPEND)
- Audit logging is best-effort (don't fail the operation if audit write fails)

Part E — Update server.go + main.go with new stores. Add gateway routes.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for P2b features
tasks.description:
Write tests for announcements, audit trail, force-logout, and suspension cascade.

Tests:

1. store_test.go additions:
- TestAnnouncementStore_Create_List — create public and custom announcements, list filtered
- TestAuditStore_Log_List — log multiple entries, list with entity_type filter, actor_id filter, date filter
- TestAuditStore_AppendOnly — verify entries are never modified

2. handlers tests:
- TestCreateAnnouncement_Success — POST public announcement → 201
- TestCreateAnnouncement_MissingTitle → 400
- TestListAnnouncements — create 2, list → 2 returned
- TestAuditTrail_ListWithFilters — log entries, GET with entity_type=ORDER → filtered
- TestForceLogout — submit 3 orders, force-logout participant → 3 orders cancelled, participant SUSPENDED
- TestSuspend_CascadesOrders — same as force-logout but verifies audit entry created
- TestReinstate — suspend then reinstate → ACTIVE

Target: 70%+ on new handler code.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md
